^2 = GameID: CUSA19493,CUSA19521,CUSA29334
^3 = NAME: Disciples: Liberation
^SECONDLAYER: NO
^4 = FILE: (Manual|Auto)Save[0-9]+\(Auto|Manual)Save__slotData_[0-9]+.d4s
{<div class="game-info"><h4>GAME INFO</h4><ul class="bullet-list"><li>It’s possible to edit stats on some weapons and armour as long as they are not unique.</li><li>Stats are stored as 32-bit floats in reverse hex (little-endian).</li><li>Search with a hex editor for <code>00 00 56 00 61 00 6C 00 75 00 65 00</code>; the 4 bytes immediately after are the stat value.</li><li>More information is in the code archive.</li></ul></div>}
+Experience Main Character
$8001000C 45007800
$70006500 72006900
$A8000014 00000004
$4C9A4705 00000000
